---
title: "lambda_method"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`test/lambda_method.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/lambda_method.py)
:::


## API Reference

#### `ansatz` {#ansatz}

```python
def ansatz(ai, p)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/lambda_method.py#L23){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---
